resolutions.finding: Local synthetic and protected production evidence are represented as different provenance values and cannot satisfy the same phase gate.
Alpha closes every production feature flag; Beta is Raw-only; M3 is fixed to Budget 1; GA has no guessed mutation budget.

The ledger distinguishes one pre-Secret context rejection from eleven protected first attempts. The latest exact-main attempt passed Alpha, Raw-only Beta and identity cleanup with 100% remote Raw recovery, zero Gmail mutation and no workflow rerun.

After the real T0702 PASS, the Owner explicitly authorized fully automatic Stage 7 continuation, Secret configuration and protected data-plane execution without calendar waits or manual approval. The current Run Contract consumes only T0703 with one controlled delivery, one first-attempt dispatch and source-mutation Budget 1.

All eight local Stage 7 mechanisms remain available and T0702/S7AC-002 passed. T0703 is authorized but not yet observed; Blue-Green, GA, owner Recovery Key drill, protected Patch operation and final Acceptance remain unexecuted and outside this Run Contract.
The owner-authorized v1.0.2 successor routes every task evidence record through its exact stage schema while preserving BLOCKED, PARTIAL and NOT_RUN claims.

The closed public failure taxonomy and bounded GitHub App token diagnostics were followed by response-scope correction and typed per-message metadata quarantine. The final protected attempt passed without exposing protected identifiers, dynamic exception text or exact mailbox counts.

Owner direction removes fixed seven-day and fourteen-day waits from Stage 7. M3 and Blue-Green can each complete in one bounded protected run when their deterministic recovery, mutation, comparison, reconciliation and single-Timeline evidence is complete; predecessor and safety gates remain fail closed.

final_acceptance_policy: No local test, workflow definition or elapsed wall-clock claim can convert a protected production Oracle to PASS.
